name: Frozen Piña Colada
title: Frozen Pina Colada Cocktail Recipe | How to make a Frozen Pina Colada | BACARDÍ Global
short_description: A frozen tropical cocktail blended with coconut rum, coconut cream, pineapple juice, and ice.
marketing_description: You've met the frozen Piña Colada, and you know where to enjoy it. See you on the pool deck!

steps: Combine all ingredients in a blender.
Add 1 cup of ice and blend until a slushy consistency forms.
Garnish with a pineapple wedge and a cherry flag.

garnish: a pineapple wedge and a cherry flag
raw_text_excerpt: How to make a Frozen Piña Colada Ingredients 50 ml BACARDÍ Coconut rum 37.5 ml coco Reàl® 37.5 ml pineapple juice 1 cup(s) ice ... Combine all ingredients in a blender. Add 1 cup of ice and blend until a slushy consistency forms. Serve in a highball glass. Garnish with a pineapple wedge and a cherry flag.
